FunctionClass: multi-leg Calabi-Yau periods (Picard curve at lowest order)

Records.description: Multi-leg fishnet family, fishnet-multileg-2d_L8_massless-internal-2d. Multi-leg two-dimensional fishnet on the trivalent (hexagonal) tiling (arXiv:2402.19034 Eq. (2.1), Figs. 5-6): the triangle-track sequence $Z_L$. Position space: a chain of $L$ trivalent integration vertices; momentum space (planar dual, notes/families_sweep_batch/derivations.md): the $L$-triangle strip on vertices $w_1..w_{L+2}$ with path edges $\{w_i,w_{i+1}\}$ and chords $\{w_i,w_{i+2}\}$, one off-shell leg at every vertex; legs $= L+2$, loops $= L$ (Euler-exact on the dual). $Z_2$ reduces to the box and $Z_3$ to a one-loop pentagon by star-triangle (VALUE identities); the lowest geometry is a genus-2 Picard curve (Eq. (3.30)). Propagator weight $2/3$ per line is a value-level datum.
